meta.title: Asset acquisition manifest
meta.purpose: Inventory of visual/media/font assets the rebuilt SvelteKit tracker needs to retrieve, self-host, or find. The dominant item (340 droid tier-art .webp files) is currently hot-linked from a third-party community site and must be self-hosted so the design isn't hostage to that host.

primarySources.gameDataset: app/drizzle/seed-data.json (canonical; upstream truth is a Google Sheet)

conventions.normName: droid name uppercased with all non-alphanumerics stripped (e.g. 'IMPERIAL PROBE' -> 'IMPERIALPROBE', 'DRK-1 PROBE' -> 'DRK1PROBE')
conventions.droidArtFilename: {normName}_{Tier}.webp where Base tier is written as _Default (e.g. MOUSE_Default.webp, CYCLOGRAV_Rainbow.webp)

categories.title: Droid tier art
categories.attribution: Community site droidtrakr.com — keep credit in README when self-hosting.
categories.notes: Prototype load order: IndexedDB blob cache → local assets/droids/ → remote fetch. Rebuild should copy all 340 into app static assets. Some higher tiers may 404 on the remote host if art doesn't exist yet — verify each fetch and record gaps.

categories.title: App icons & social share images
categories.notes: Only app/src/lib/assets/favicon.svg exists and it is NOT linked in app/src/app.html.

items.name: favicon.svg link
items.need: wire existing favicon.svg into app.html head

categories.title: Web fonts (self-hosted)
categories.notes: Redesign uses these; woff2 files were only seen in a worktree build output, not committed to main source.

categories.title: Bespoke game iconography (optional)
categories.action: optional — handoff says icon set choice is the designer's; today everything non-droid is text/emoji plus one inline SVG (CHIPICON upgrade-chip glyph in prototype).

items.name: Upgrade Chips
items.have: inline SVG CHIPICON exists in prototype

groups.note: one glyph per distinct upgrade if desired
paints/hats/rings — mostly color swatches, likely no art needed
